name: Telegram Approval Buttons
description: Adds inline buttons to exec approval messages in Telegram and Slack. Tap to approve/deny without typing commands.

chatId.description: Telegram chat ID where approval buttons are sent. Falls back to channels.telegram.allowFrom[0].

language.description: UI language for user-facing plugin text. Defaults to en.

botToken.description: Telegram bot token. Falls back to channels.telegram.token or TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN env.

oneOf.description: Legacy shorthand proxy URL for Telegram Bot API requests.

enabled.description: Whether proxying is enabled for Telegram Bot API requests.

url.description: HTTP/HTTPS proxy URL for Telegram Bot API requests.

strict.description: If true, fail closed when proxy is configured but unavailable.

insecureTls.description: Allow insecure TLS when the proxy injects a self-signed certificate chain.

proxy.description: Optional proxy configuration. Falls back to channels.telegram.proxy when omitted.

slackBotToken.description: Slack bot OAuth token. Falls back to channels.slack.token or SLACK_BOT_TOKEN env.

slackChannelId.description: Slack channel or DM ID for approval buttons. Falls back to channels.slack.allowFrom[0] or SLACK_CHANNEL_ID env.

staleMins.description: Minutes before a pending approval is considered stale and cleaned up.

chatId.label: Telegram Chat ID
chatId.help: Auto-detected from channels.telegram.allowFrom if not set.

language.label: Language
language.help: User-facing language for approval messages and health status.

botToken.label: Telegram Bot Token
botToken.help: Only needed if different from the main Telegram channel token.

proxy.label: Telegram Proxy
proxy.help: Supports legacy string URL or structured object config. Falls back to channels.telegram.proxy when omitted. Use insecureTls only when your proxy intercepts TLS with a self-signed CA.

slackBotToken.label: Slack Bot Token
slackBotToken.help: Only needed if different from the main Slack channel token.

slackChannelId.label: Slack Channel/DM ID
slackChannelId.help: Your Slack user ID for DM buttons, or a channel ID. Auto-detected from channels.slack.allowFrom if not set.
